name: Bubble Magic
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a large bucket with water and add dishwashing detergent (the magic potion).
2. Choose one child to be the "Wand Wizard." This child uses a straw as their magic wand.
3. The Wand Wizard begins blowing into the mixture.
4. Select another child to be the "Color Wizard." This child drops food coloring over the bubbles.
5. Another child takes on the role of the "Paper Wizard," gently laying a piece of paper over the bubbles and tapping it.
6. Enjoy the magical bubble prints! The results vary each time, appealing to all age groups.
7. Kids can take turns playing different wizards during future sessions.
Reformatted for Meal Master by: CYGNUS, HCPM52C & CMINEAH
